name: seoane-tools
description: Luis Seoane's Claude Code plugin marketplace — reusable skills for building SaaS and running studies.

plugins.name: saas-toolkit
plugins.description: A team of stack-detecting skills for building professional SaaS: scaffolding, auth, payments, database, UI, e2e testing, browser verification, CI/CD, and SEO/landing pages.

plugins.name: studies-toolkit
plugins.description: A team of skills for studies and reports: financial analysis, business-health monitoring with early warning, census/statistics, legal & commercial documents, and report building. Pairs with the built-in deep-research skill.

plugins.name: audit-toolkit
plugins.description: A team of skills for rigorous, standards-based, defensible audits tuned to U.S. standards (US GAAP, AICPA AU-C / PCAOB AS): financial audit methodology, internal control (COSO / SOX ICFR), reconciliations, fraud detection (AU-C 240, BSA/FinCEN AML), and working papers / audit trail (AU-C 230 / AS 1215). Output in Spanish by default.

plugins.name: writing-toolkit
plugins.description: A team of writing skills with a modern, engaging voice and subtle, sharp touches when warranted: general writing/rewriting, copywriting, social content, and style editing. Output in Spanish by default.
